steps.title: Isolate x
steps.content:
Simplify the equation 16x + 24 = 24x by subtracting 16x from both sides.
$$\begin{align*} 16x+24 &= 24x \\ 24 &= 24x - 16x \\ 24 &= 8x \end{align*}$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 8 to find the value of x.
$$x = \frac{24}{8}$$
 That matches choice D — D is correct.
